slides.title: How you *spread* protein matters too.
slides.sub: Total protein is only half the story. Spreading it across the day helps you hold onto muscle as you age.

slides.title: Total isn't the whole story
slides.body: Hitting a daily number matters, but the body cares how that protein *arrives* across your meals too.

slides.title: Spread it out
slides.body: Muscle responds best to steady, regular protein. A big dinner alone *may leave* much of the day under fed.

slides.title: Protein at every meal
slides.body: Aim for a solid serving, roughly thirty grams, at each meal. Even, repeated doses can support muscle as you age.

slides.title: Simple ways to hit it
slides.body: Eggs, yogurt, fish, beans, chicken or tofu make it easy. Building meals *around protein* keeps each one working for you.

slides.title: Even doses, all day
slides.body: Don't save it all for dinner. Spreading protein across the day *may help* protect the muscle that keeps you strong.

slides.title: Feed the muscle that *keeps you strong*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns your food, protein and habits into one daily score, so steady, muscle-friendly eating becomes easy.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Eating enough protein matters. So does how you spread it across the day. 🌿

Muscle responds best to steady, even doses, so aim for a solid serving, around thirty grams, at each meal instead of saving it all for dinner. Eggs, yogurt, fish and beans make it easy. Save this. 🔖

youtube_title: Why Spreading Protein Across the Day Protects Muscle
